(function(){var sdk,root;function roll(){return 1+Math.floor(Math.random()*6);}function mount(r,s){sdk=s;root=r;root.innerHTML='

';root.querySelector("#dBack").onclick=function(){sdk.ui.back();};var face=root.querySelector("#dFace");root.querySelector("#dRoll").onclick=function(){var v=roll();face.textContent=["⚀","⚁","⚂","⚃","⚄","⚅"][v-1];sdk.ui.haptics(10);sdk.ui.toast("Выпало: "+v);sdk.events.track("rolled",{v:v});};sdk.ui.hud({left:"Кубик",cNum:6,cLbl:"граней",rNum:6,rLbl:"бросай"});}function unmount(){}RobTop.register({id:"dice",mount:mount,unmount:unmount});})();
